title: Anyone know how this is using monday.com?

posts.author: bianchi (Verena Bianchi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey folks,

I came across a rbx gaming tool Bloxstrap and it looks like they’ve got some of their updates/tasks flowing through monday.com. Looked pretty smooth.

Anyone know how they might be setting that up? Zapier, webhooks, or something built-in?

Thinking about trying the same thing for my own team, just not sure where to start.
